docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF S.F. MUNICIPAL RAIWAY EMPLOYEES FEDERAL C.U. AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, LEO SUMMONS ISSUED
